column1: HERA = Housing and Economic Recovery Act. LIHTC = low-income housing tax credit. PIS = LIHTC properties placed in service database.
1 Area Median Gross Income (AMGI) was derived by dividing the Income Limit by Percent Income Restriction.
2 Includes only households with income certified in 2021, 2022 or 2023.
3 The reported income for nearly all tenants in Nevada was $1, which is not consistent with previously reported data.  Missouri reported an increase in households
with income of $1, from 0% in 2021 to 15.3% in 2022.
